name: cursor-team-tools
description: Deploy team Cursor configuration (skills, rules, MCP) to workspaces with automatic single-repo and multi-repo layout detection.

commands.title: Cursor Team Tools: Locate Plugin Repo
Cursor Team Tools: Check for Updates
Cursor Team Tools: Open Setup Guide

cursorTeamTools.pluginRepoPath.description: Absolute path to the CursorPlugins repo. If empty, auto-detected as a sibling or subfolder named 'CursorPlugins'.

cursorTeamTools.repoProfiles.description: Maps repository folder names to profile names. Profiles correspond to frontmatter tags in the plugin's skills and rules.

cursorTeamTools.autoSyncOnStartup.description: Automatically deploy .cursor/ configuration when a workspace opens.

cursorTeamTools.checkForUpdatesOnStartup.description: Check the plugin repo for updates when the workspace opens and prompt to re-sync.

walkthroughs.title: Cursor Team Tools Setup
walkthroughs.description: Configure and deploy team Cursor skills, rules, and MCP servers to your workspace.

steps.title: Welcome
steps.description: Learn what Cursor Team Tools does and how it works.

steps.title: Locate Plugin Repo
steps.description:
Point the extension to your CursorPlugins repository.

[Locate Plugin Repo](command:cursorTeamTools.locatePluginRepo)

steps.title: Configure Repo Profiles
steps.description:
Map repo folder names to profiles.

[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22cursorTeamTools.repoProfiles%22)

steps.title: Enable Auto-Update Checks
steps.description:
Get notified when the plugin repo is updated.

[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22cursorTeamTools.checkForUpdatesOnStartup%22)
